description_long: This is a modern bungalow complex set within a walled property, featuring a main single-story building with flat roofs and large rectangular windows. The front yard is landscaped with a paved entrance, a central fountain, and symmetrical rows of trees and shrubs. The property includes multiple structures: a main house, a smaller outbuilding, and a larger secondary building, all surrounded by manicured lawns and garden beds. The main entrance is marked by a gate and steps leading up to the paved area, flanked by decorative pillars. The rear and sides of the property are bordered by flowering trees and additional greenery, providing privacy and aesthetic appeal. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open green spaces, and a blend of functional and decorative outdoor elements.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow complex with landscaped gardens, a central fountain, and multiple outbuildings within a walled property.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, paved courtyard, central fountain, and symmetrical landscaping with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the main building's flat roof, large windows, and the arrangement of outbuildings and flowering trees along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back lawns, secondary structures, and the row of flowering trees providing privacy at the back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the larger secondary building, the red-roofed outbuilding, and the continuation of the landscaped garden.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
